basis.zh: 市场隐含概率 + Elo 强度快照 + Poisson 比分分布集成；暂未接入 xG、伤停、首发和校准器。
basis.en: Market-implied probability, Elo strength snapshot, and Poisson score baseline; xG, injuries, lineups, and calibration are not connected yet.

calibration.zh: 当前为未校准基准概率；后续需要用时间滚动回测做 Brier / log loss / reliability 校准。
calibration.en: This is an uncalibrated baseline; rolling backtests with Brier, log loss, and reliability calibration are needed next.

tipLabel.zh: 观察为主 胜平负不强推

explanation.zh: 本场胜平负未通过推荐闸门：低赔、平局压力、让球确认或风险标签存在不一致，只保留为赛前观察项。
explanation.en: This 1X2 market did not pass the recommendation gate. Low odds, draw pressure, handicap confirmation, or risk tags are not aligned, so it remains watch-only.

analysisItems.zh: 官方 HAD SP：主胜 1.23 / 平局 4.75 / 客胜 9.40；去水支持率约 主胜 72% / 平局 19% / 客胜 9%。
analysisItems.en: Official HAD SP: 1.23 / 4.75 / 9.40; normalized support is about home 72% / draw 19% / away 9%.

analysisItems.zh: 推荐闸门：模型优势约 46 个百分点，市场优势约 53 个百分点，让球同向支持约 47%；未达到强推条件，暂不输出单一胜平负方向。
analysisItems.en: Recommendation gate: model edge is about 46 points, market edge about 53 points, same-side handicap support about 47%; no single 1X2 pick is promoted.

analysisItems.zh: 平局支持率未明显压低主方向，但仍需留意赛前 SP 变化。 官方 SP 更新时间：2026-06-06 19:28:22。
analysisItems.en: Draw support is not dominant, but late SP movement still matters. Official SP updated at 2026-06-06 19:28:22.

tipLabel.zh: 观察为主 进球数不强推

explanation.zh: 进球趋势未通过推荐闸门：总进球期望约 2.78，大 2.5 概率约 53%，边际不足时不强行给大/小球方向。
explanation.en: The goals trend did not pass the recommendation gate. Total expected goals are about 2.78, over 2.5 probability about 53%, so no over/under pick is promoted.

analysisItems.zh: 比分热区：2-0 附近；候选方向 总进球 3+ 的模型概率约 53%，低于强推阈值。
analysisItems.en: Score heat zone: around 2-0; candidate Total Goals 3+ is about 53%, below the promotion threshold.

analysisItems.zh: 大 2.5 球概率约 53%，该指标用于走势参考，不等同于官方总进球 SP。

tipLabel.zh: 观察为主 推荐闸门未过

explanation.zh: 模型没有否定主胜 比利时，只是拒绝把它抬到高可信：市场第一方向领先 53 个百分点，但让球验证和风险项还没闭合。
explanation.en: The model is not rejecting Home Win (比利时); it is refusing to upgrade it. Market lead is 53 points, but handicap and risk checks are not closed.

analysisItems.zh: 降级原因：主胜 比利时对应 让球同向支持约 47%；让球盘去水支持约 主胜 47% / 平 26% / 客胜 27%，和普通胜平负主线存在温差。
analysisItems.en: Downgrade reason: Home Win (比利时) has same-side handicap support is about 47%; handicap normalized support is home 47% / draw 26% / away 27%, not fully aligned with HAD.

analysisItems.zh: 进球侧：比分热区 2-0，总期望 2.78，大 2.5 约 53%，双方进球约 43%。
analysisItems.en: Goals: score heat zone 2-0, total xG 2.78, over 2.5 about 53%, BTTS about 43%.

analysisItems.zh: 临场复核：热门过热。如果赛前 SP 继续降赔但让球支持不上来，仍按观察处理。
analysisItems.en: Late check: Heavy favorite. If SP shortens without handicap confirmation, keep this as watch-only.

dataPolicy.zh: 仅使用已接入的中国竞彩网官方 SP、让球 SP、赛果和 SP 快照；伤停、首发、天气、裁判等未接入数据明确视为不足，不编造。
dataPolicy.en: Uses connected official Sporttery SP, handicap SP, results, and SP snapshots only. Injuries, lineups, weather, and referee data are treated as unavailable unless connected.

dataPolicy.zh: 仅使用已接入的中国竞彩网官方 SP、让球 SP、赛果和 SP 快照；伤停、首发、天气、裁判等未接入数据明确视为不足，不编造。
dataPolicy.en: Uses connected official Sporttery SP, handicap SP, results, and SP snapshots only. Injuries, lineups, weather, and referee data are treated as unavailable unless connected.
